title: AFLR Soundpack Lite
description:
The recommended companion soundpack for ArdisFoxx's Lewd Roleplaying (AFLR, module id ardisfoxxs-lewd-pf2e). A curated, lightweight selection of voice profiles and ambient SFX - a small download that still covers AFLP's full audio feature set: escalating moans, climax / edge / struggle / defeat voices, cumflation lines, positional plaps, oral and fingering SFX, and cumflation stings. AFLP auto-detects it once enabled (no path setup).

Want more sounds? The full AFLR Soundpack bundles every voice actor and the complete SFX library (a much larger download). Install it instead and AFLP uses it automatically.

Audio credit: All voice and sound-effect audio is from the OpenNSFW Sound Pack, licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). This is an SFX pack - please contact @OpenNSFWSP rather than individual contributors. See CREDITS.txt at the module root and 'README - OpenNSFW SFX Pack Terms.pdf' in the aflp-sfx folder.
